case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. ALICE PULLIAM et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT RENTAL AGREEMENT . FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PULLIAM, ALICE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1116 CONNECTICUT ST. S.F. CA. 94107, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT PULLIAM, ALICE DOES 1 -10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT PULLIAM, ALICE
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT PULLIAM, ALICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED MAR-26-2007, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT PULLIAM, ALICE
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT PULLIAM, ALICE
